TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Marshall_Island, title = Marshall_Island, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marshall_Island} }

S.FORM: → Marshall Islands Masyalu kanatanatal a kitakit Takaray sowal O Masyalu kanatanatal a kitakit I o pangangan no Masyalo a tamdaw I "Aolepān Aorōkin M̧ajeļ",o no Ikilis I "Marshall Islands",o ma'alaay a ngangan I o Masyalo, itini'ay I saka'amis no Masinanotay a riyar .O cecay a pala no Mikronisya palapalan ko Masylo,o dadahal no pala I 181 sq km,o no riyar a kakahad I cirafasay to tosa a 'emang sq km, o tamdaw I 68.480,laklak sanay a maro' I 1,156 a pala ato rakarakan, o sa'alomanay ko tamdaw a maro'I itiraay I Maciwlu a niyaro' o tatapangan a niyaro' no kitakit. O Masyalo a kitakit I o kapolongan ko sici o congtong ko mikowanay,o mitidapi'ay I Amirika, orira ko pidama no Amirika to sofitay a mipidipot,a mipa'orip. Nawhany, caay ka hakowa ko kinaira no maamaan nona kitakit,sa orira ko pitadipi to pipadahof no Amirika, o mifotingay ko saka'rip no tamdaw itini. O payso no itiniay I o no Amirika. O kapolongan a sowal no itiniay I o Masylo ato Ikilis. O tahapinangan no Masyalo palapalan kitakit.(la'enoay a cuka) Rikisi O tamdaw nona kitakit I ono Satimolan a Sowal ko sowal ngara, o tamdaw sa I ono Satimolan Kitakit, nikawrira,I 1885miheca ma'eco no Toic, tahira I Sakakinacecay Lalood I o Dipong to ko mikowanay.1944miheca,o Amirika to ko mi'ecoay a mikowan, maherek to ko sakakinatosa a lalood I o patoroden no Linhoko ko Amirika a mikowan. Toya pikowanan no Amirika nani 1946miheca tahira I 1968miheca,mipatireng ko Amirika to pitanaman to 'icel no pakotang, o kafana'an aca I kina 66 a misaliyaliyaw a mitanam to pakotang, onini ko sakaciadada ko itiniay a tamdaw mapatidi' to lintokin, ono adada toni'an I caay kafilo a paadahen, ano ciwawa sa I sahetoay o mangilosay. 1979miheca,misawad to pikapot I Mikulonisya, sa'iked sato a mipatireng tono niyah a kitakit,o niyah ko mikowan tono niyah a kitakit.1986miheca,matatilid ato Amirika toniyah a nisafaloco'an a pikapot,toya to a miheca 10folad,21romi'ad,si'iked sato a tomireng ko Masylo, caay to ko tao ko mikowanay.1991miheca,1991miheca mikapot to I Linhoko. Kaitiraan a sera O kaitiraan no RapaNui I tosaay ko pecih sakawali ato sa'etip.O sakawali a malilisay a pala I o Lalatak(o kahadakan no cidal sanay),o saka'etio a mililisay a pala I o Lalik(o piceleman no cidal sanay), o kslala'ed no sawali ato sa'etip 208km ko kararaay(nani Posong tahira I Taypak ). O tosa no kalitolo a tamdaw I itiray maro' I Maciwlo ato Ipay. Sici 1979miheca malaheci a masanga' ko Kinpo ,do'edoen ko rikec nona Kinpo I o congtong ko sakakaay tapang no kitakit, o mikowanay,o mamalatapang a tamdaw I nani tiraay I kakitaan no niyaro' a piri'en. O sakakaay a pikaykian no kitakit ko misanga'ay to polong a rikec no kitakit(matiya o Lipoing no Taywan),o polong no iing I 33 ko tamdaw, sepat miheca kinacecay a liyawen a misingkiw. Ira ho ko roma a sakakaay a pikaykian o Iroji hananay, o iing nonini I o kalo pala aniyaro', ano caay ka tatodong ko misanga'an no Lipoing a rikec to rayray no to'as I manga'ayay a mifelih kona Iroji papiliyaw a papisanga' anoca papisalof to rikec no kitakit,sa oninian ko sakacaay ka doka' ko to'as a wayway ato pinangan no niyaro', to ma'osaw ko kalacecay no to'as a sera. Mitanam to 'icel no pakotang 1946miheca tahira I 1968miheca,mipatireng ko Amirika to pitanaman to 'icel no pakotang, o kafana'an aca I kina 66 a misaliyaliyaw a mitanam to pakotang, onini ko sakaciadada ko itiniay a tamdaw mapatidi' to lintokin, ono adada toni'an I caay kafilo a paadahen, ano ciwawa sa I sahetoay o mangilosay.
S.PHON: * marsħaɾɾ isɾanɬ~ɮs masjaɾo~u~u kanatanataɾ a kitakit takaraj so~uwaɾ o~u masjaɾo~u~u kanatanataɾ a kitakit i o~u paŋaŋan no~u masjaɾo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i "ao~uɾəp*n ao~ur*kin m*ajə*",o~u no~u ikiɾis i "marsħaɾɾ isɾanɬ~ɮs",o~u maʡaɾaaj a ŋaŋan i o~u masjaɾo~u, itiniʡaj i sakaʡamis no~u masinano~utaj a rijar .o~u ʦəʦaj a paɾa no~u mikro~unisja paɾapaɾan ko~u masjɾo~u,o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u paɾa i *** s* km,o~u no~u rijar a kakaħaɬ~ɮ i ʦirafasaj to~u to~usa a ʡəmaŋ s* km, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw i **.***,ɾakɾak sanaj a maro~uʡ i *,*** a paɾa ato~u rakarakan, o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡi itiraaj i maʦiwɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit. o~u masjaɾo~u a kitakit i o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u siʦi o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj,o~u mitiɬ~ɮapiʡaj i amirika, o~urira ko~u piɬ~ɮama no~u amirika to~u so~ufitaj a mipiɬ~ɮipo~ut,a mipaʡo~urip. nawħanj, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u kinaira no~u maamaan no~una kitakit,sa o~urira ko~u pitaɬ~ɮipi to~u pipaɬ~ɮaħo~uf no~u amirika, o~u mifo~utiŋaj ko~u sakaʡrip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini. o~u pajso~u no~u itiniaj i o~u no~u amirika. o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj i o~u masjɾo~u ato~u ikiɾis. o~u taħapinaŋan no~u masjaɾo~u paɾapaɾan kitakit.(ɾaʡəno~uaj a ʦo~u~uka) rikisi o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~una kitakit i o~uno~u satimo~uɾan a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ ŋara, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw sa i o~uno~u satimo~uɾan kitakit, nikawrira,i ****miħəʦa maʡəʦo~u no~u to~uiʦ, taħira i sakakinaʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ko~u miko~uwanaj.****miħəʦa,o~u amirika to~u ko~u miʡəʦo~uaj a miko~uwan, maħərək to~u ko~u sakakinato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i o~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮən no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u amirika a miko~uwan. to~uja piko~uwanan no~u amirika nani ****miħəʦa taħira i ****miħəʦa,mipatirəŋ ko~u amirika to~u pitanaman to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ, o~u kafanaʡan aʦa i kina ** a misaɾijaɾijaw a mitanam to~u pako~utaŋ, o~unini ko~u sakaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapatiɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ɾinto~ukin, o~uno~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~uniʡan i ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a paaɬ~ɮaħən, ano~u ʦiwawa sa i saħəto~uaj o~u maŋiɾo~usaj. ****miħəʦa,misawaɬ~ɮ to~u pikapo~ut i miko~u~uɾo~unisja, saʡikəɬ~ɮ sato~u a mipatirəŋ to~uno~u nijaħ a kitakit,o~u nijaħ ko~u miko~uwan to~uno~u nijaħ a kitakit.****miħəʦa,matatiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u amirika to~unijaħ a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a pikapo~ut,to~uja to~u a miħəʦa **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ,**ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ,siʡikəɬ~ɮ sato~u a to~umirəŋ ko~u masjɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u ko~u tao~u ko~u miko~uwanaj.****miħəʦa,****miħəʦa mikapo~ut to~u i ɾinħo~uko~u. kaitiraan a səra o~u kaitiraan no~u rapano~u~ui i to~usaaj ko~u pəʦiħ sakawaɾi ato~u saʡətip.o~u sakawaɾi a maɾiɾisaj a paɾa i o~u ɾaɾatak(o~u kaħaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ sanaj),o~u sakaʡətio~u a miɾiɾisaj a paɾa i o~u ɾaɾik(o~u piʦəɾəman no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ sanaj), o~u ksɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u sawaɾi ato~u saʡətip ***km ko~u kararaaj(nani po~uso~uŋ taħira i tajpak ). o~u to~usa no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i itiraj maro~uʡ i maʦiwɾo~u ato~u ipaj. siʦi ****miħəʦa maɾaħəʦi a masaŋaʡ ko~u kinpo~u ,ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u rikəʦ no~una kinpo~u i o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ko~u sakakaaj tapaŋ no~u kitakit, o~u miko~uwanaj,o~u mamaɾatapaŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw i nani tiraaj i kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ a piriʡən. o~u sakakaaj a pikajkian no~u kitakit ko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a rikəʦ no~u kitakit(matija o~u ɾipo~uiŋ no~u tajwan),o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u iiŋ i ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, səpat miħəʦa kinaʦəʦaj a ɾijawən a misiŋkiw. ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a sakakaaj a pikajkian o~u iro~uji ħananaj, o~u iiŋ no~unini i o~u kaɾo~u paɾa anijaro~uʡ, ano~u ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u misaŋaʡan no~u ɾipo~uiŋ a rikəʦ to~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas i maŋaʡajaj a mifəɾiħ ko~una iro~uji papiɾijaw a papisaŋaʡ ano~uʦa papisaɾo~uf to~u rikəʦ no~u kitakit,sa o~uninian ko~u sakaʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u to~uʡas a wajwaj ato~u pinaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ, to~u maʡo~usaw ko~u kaɾaʦəʦaj no~u to~uʡas a səra. mitanam to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ ****miħəʦa taħira i ****miħəʦa,mipatirəŋ ko~u amirika to~u pitanaman to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ, o~u kafanaʡan aʦa i kina ** a misaɾijaɾijaw a mitanam to~u pako~utaŋ, o~unini ko~u sakaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapatiɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ɾinto~ukin, o~uno~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~uniʡan i ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a paaɬ~ɮaħən, ano~u ʦiwawa sa i saħəto~uaj o~u maŋiɾo~usaj.
S.FORM: → Marshall Islands Masyalu kanatanatal a kitakit Takaray sowal O Masyalu kanatanatal a kitakit I o pangangan no Masyalo a tamdaw I "Aolepān Aorōkin M̧ajeļ",o no Ikilis I "Marshall Islands",o ma'alaay a ngangan I o Masyalo, itini'ay I saka'amis no Masinanotay a riyar .O cecay a pala no Mikronisya palapalan ko Masylo,o dadahal no pala I 181 sq km,o no riyar a kakahad I cirafasay to tosa a 'emang sq km, o tamdaw I 68.480,laklak sanay a maro' I 1,156 a pala ato rakarakan, o sa'alomanay ko tamdaw a maro'I itiraay I Maciwlu a niyaro' o tatapangan a niyaro' no kitakit. O Masyalo a kitakit I o kapolongan ko sici o congtong ko mikowanay,o mitidapi'ay I Amirika, orira ko pidama no Amirika to sofitay a mipidipot,a mipa'orip. Nawhany, caay ka hakowa ko kinaira no maamaan nona kitakit,sa orira ko pitadipi to pipadahof no Amirika, o mifotingay ko saka'rip no tamdaw itini. O payso no itiniay I o no Amirika. O kapolongan a sowal no itiniay I o Masylo ato Ikilis. O tahapinangan no Masyalo palapalan kitakit.(la'enoay a cuka) Rikisi O tamdaw nona kitakit I ono Satimolan a Sowal ko sowal ngara, o tamdaw sa I ono Satimolan Kitakit, nikawrira,I 1885miheca ma'eco no Toic, tahira I Sakakinacecay Lalood I o Dipong to ko mikowanay.1944miheca,o Amirika to ko mi'ecoay a mikowan, maherek to ko sakakinatosa a lalood I o patoroden no Linhoko ko Amirika a mikowan. Toya pikowanan no Amirika nani 1946miheca tahira I 1968miheca,mipatireng ko Amirika to pitanaman to 'icel no pakotang, o kafana'an aca I kina 66 a misaliyaliyaw a mitanam to pakotang, onini ko sakaciadada ko itiniay a tamdaw mapatidi' to lintokin, ono adada toni'an I caay kafilo a paadahen, ano ciwawa sa I sahetoay o mangilosay. 1979miheca,misawad to pikapot I Mikulonisya, sa'iked sato a mipatireng tono niyah a kitakit,o niyah ko mikowan tono niyah a kitakit.1986miheca,matatilid ato Amirika toniyah a nisafaloco'an a pikapot,toya to a miheca 10folad,21romi'ad,si'iked sato a tomireng ko Masylo, caay to ko tao ko mikowanay.1991miheca,1991miheca mikapot to I Linhoko. Kaitiraan a sera O kaitiraan no RapaNui I tosaay ko pecih sakawali ato sa'etip.O sakawali a malilisay a pala I o Lalatak(o kahadakan no cidal sanay),o saka'etio a mililisay a pala I o Lalik(o piceleman no cidal sanay), o kslala'ed no sawali ato sa'etip 208km ko kararaay(nani Posong tahira I Taypak ). O tosa no kalitolo a tamdaw I itiray maro' I Maciwlo ato Ipay. Sici 1979miheca malaheci a masanga' ko Kinpo ,do'edoen ko rikec nona Kinpo I o congtong ko sakakaay tapang no kitakit, o mikowanay,o mamalatapang a tamdaw I nani tiraay I kakitaan no niyaro' a piri'en. O sakakaay a pikaykian no kitakit ko misanga'ay to polong a rikec no kitakit(matiya o Lipoing no Taywan),o polong no iing I 33 ko tamdaw, sepat miheca kinacecay a liyawen a misingkiw. Ira ho ko roma a sakakaay a pikaykian o Iroji hananay, o iing nonini I o kalo pala aniyaro', ano caay ka tatodong ko misanga'an no Lipoing a rikec to rayray no to'as I manga'ayay a mifelih kona Iroji papiliyaw a papisanga' anoca papisalof to rikec no kitakit,sa oninian ko sakacaay ka doka' ko to'as a wayway ato pinangan no niyaro', to ma'osaw ko kalacecay no to'as a sera. Mitanam to 'icel no pakotang 1946miheca tahira I 1968miheca,mipatireng ko Amirika to pitanaman to 'icel no pakotang, o kafana'an aca I kina 66 a misaliyaliyaw a mitanam to pakotang, onini ko sakaciadada ko itiniay a tamdaw mapatidi' to lintokin, ono adada toni'an I caay kafilo a paadahen, ano ciwawa sa I sahetoay o mangilosay.
S.PHON: * marsħaɾɾ isɾanɬ~ɮs masjaɾo~u~u kanatanataɾ a kitakit takaraj so~uwaɾ o~u masjaɾo~u~u kanatanataɾ a kitakit i o~u paŋaŋan no~u masjaɾo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i "ao~uɾəp*n ao~ur*kin m*ajə*",o~u no~u ikiɾis i "marsħaɾɾ isɾanɬ~ɮs",o~u maʡaɾaaj a ŋaŋan i o~u masjaɾo~u, itiniʡaj i sakaʡamis no~u masinano~utaj a rijar .o~u ʦəʦaj a paɾa no~u mikro~unisja paɾapaɾan ko~u masjɾo~u,o~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ no~u paɾa i *** s* km,o~u no~u rijar a kakaħaɬ~ɮ i ʦirafasaj to~u to~usa a ʡəmaŋ s* km, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw i **.***,ɾakɾak sanaj a maro~uʡ i *,*** a paɾa ato~u rakarakan, o~u saʡaɾo~umanaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡi itiraaj i maʦiwɾo~u~u a nijaro~uʡ o~u tatapaŋan a nijaro~uʡ no~u kitakit. o~u masjaɾo~u a kitakit i o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan ko~u siʦi o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ko~u miko~uwanaj,o~u mitiɬ~ɮapiʡaj i amirika, o~urira ko~u piɬ~ɮama no~u amirika to~u so~ufitaj a mipiɬ~ɮipo~ut,a mipaʡo~urip. nawħanj, ʦaaj ka ħako~uwa ko~u kinaira no~u maamaan no~una kitakit,sa o~urira ko~u pitaɬ~ɮipi to~u pipaɬ~ɮaħo~uf no~u amirika, o~u mifo~utiŋaj ko~u sakaʡrip no~u tamɬ~ɮaw itini. o~u pajso~u no~u itiniaj i o~u no~u amirika. o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan a so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj i o~u masjɾo~u ato~u ikiɾis. o~u taħapinaŋan no~u masjaɾo~u paɾapaɾan kitakit.(ɾaʡəno~uaj a ʦo~u~uka) rikisi o~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~una kitakit i o~uno~u satimo~uɾan a so~uwaɾ ko~u so~uwaɾ ŋara, o~u tamɬ~ɮaw sa i o~uno~u satimo~uɾan kitakit, nikawrira,i ****miħəʦa maʡəʦo~u no~u to~uiʦ, taħira i sakakinaʦəʦaj ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ to~u ko~u miko~uwanaj.****miħəʦa,o~u amirika to~u ko~u miʡəʦo~uaj a miko~uwan, maħərək to~u ko~u sakakinato~usa a ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i o~u pato~uro~uɬ~ɮən no~u ɾinħo~uko~u ko~u amirika a miko~uwan. to~uja piko~uwanan no~u amirika nani ****miħəʦa taħira i ****miħəʦa,mipatirəŋ ko~u amirika to~u pitanaman to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ, o~u kafanaʡan aʦa i kina ** a misaɾijaɾijaw a mitanam to~u pako~utaŋ, o~unini ko~u sakaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapatiɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ɾinto~ukin, o~uno~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~uniʡan i ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a paaɬ~ɮaħən, ano~u ʦiwawa sa i saħəto~uaj o~u maŋiɾo~usaj. ****miħəʦa,misawaɬ~ɮ to~u pikapo~ut i miko~u~uɾo~unisja, saʡikəɬ~ɮ sato~u a mipatirəŋ to~uno~u nijaħ a kitakit,o~u nijaħ ko~u miko~uwan to~uno~u nijaħ a kitakit.****miħəʦa,matatiɾiɬ~ɮ ato~u amirika to~unijaħ a nisafaɾo~uʦo~uʡan a pikapo~ut,to~uja to~u a miħəʦa **fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ,**ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ,siʡikəɬ~ɮ sato~u a to~umirəŋ ko~u masjɾo~u, ʦaaj to~u ko~u tao~u ko~u miko~uwanaj.****miħəʦa,****miħəʦa mikapo~ut to~u i ɾinħo~uko~u. kaitiraan a səra o~u kaitiraan no~u rapano~u~ui i to~usaaj ko~u pəʦiħ sakawaɾi ato~u saʡətip.o~u sakawaɾi a maɾiɾisaj a paɾa i o~u ɾaɾatak(o~u kaħaɬ~ɮakan no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ sanaj),o~u sakaʡətio~u a miɾiɾisaj a paɾa i o~u ɾaɾik(o~u piʦəɾəman no~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ sanaj), o~u ksɾaɾaʡəɬ~ɮ no~u sawaɾi ato~u saʡətip ***km ko~u kararaaj(nani po~uso~uŋ taħira i tajpak ). o~u to~usa no~u kaɾito~uɾo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw i itiraj maro~uʡ i maʦiwɾo~u ato~u ipaj. siʦi ****miħəʦa maɾaħəʦi a masaŋaʡ ko~u kinpo~u ,ɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uən ko~u rikəʦ no~una kinpo~u i o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ko~u sakakaaj tapaŋ no~u kitakit, o~u miko~uwanaj,o~u mamaɾatapaŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw i nani tiraaj i kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ a piriʡən. o~u sakakaaj a pikajkian no~u kitakit ko~u misaŋaʡaj to~u po~uɾo~uŋ a rikəʦ no~u kitakit(matija o~u ɾipo~uiŋ no~u tajwan),o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u iiŋ i ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, səpat miħəʦa kinaʦəʦaj a ɾijawən a misiŋkiw. ira ħo~u ko~u ro~uma a sakakaaj a pikajkian o~u iro~uji ħananaj, o~u iiŋ no~unini i o~u kaɾo~u paɾa anijaro~uʡ, ano~u ʦaaj ka tato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u misaŋaʡan no~u ɾipo~uiŋ a rikəʦ to~u rajraj no~u to~uʡas i maŋaʡajaj a mifəɾiħ ko~una iro~uji papiɾijaw a papisaŋaʡ ano~uʦa papisaɾo~uf to~u rikəʦ no~u kitakit,sa o~uninian ko~u sakaʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u to~uʡas a wajwaj ato~u pinaŋan no~u nijaro~uʡ, to~u maʡo~usaw ko~u kaɾaʦəʦaj no~u to~uʡas a səra. mitanam to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ ****miħəʦa taħira i ****miħəʦa,mipatirəŋ ko~u amirika to~u pitanaman to~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u pako~utaŋ, o~u kafanaʡan aʦa i kina ** a misaɾijaɾijaw a mitanam to~u pako~utaŋ, o~unini ko~u sakaʦiaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ko~u itiniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mapatiɬ~ɮiʡ to~u ɾinto~ukin, o~uno~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa to~uniʡan i ʦaaj kafiɾo~u a paaɬ~ɮaħən, ano~u ʦiwawa sa i saħəto~uaj o~u maŋiɾo~usaj.
